textByHashes.e07bfbb4941c7d9cc78ce192a74a0d6c8a60548d: I'm digging for saltpetre, of course. Got to have plenty of saltpetre for the farms. You should grab a spade and get to work too - they always need saltpetre.
textByHashes.640f5e299c8420468c3100113c781271c1b16820: It's a critical ingredient in a special fertiliser used on the farms here. Just mix it with some compost - ordinary compost, not that super stuff - to make the fertiliser.
textByHashes.603ed0fc81f2d28efc8a2c00c39c940c9135e190: Once you've got fertiliser, you can use it on Farmer Gricoller's fruit farm. Alternatively, Hosidius farmers always want some. You could sell it to them.
textByHashes.3a912b259374c3750485a1a67c5e3ee5a6427de7: Yes, but you've got no room for it.
textByHashes.f323f950756a1dec2a7ba6e566fe727afbc9ff54: Yes, but I can see you don't need it.
textByHashes.07d72e48e8292d070070b6a820e635060cf7e3c3: Very well done, now let me get back to digging!
